mapper.select:
select count(1) from sys_dict_type
and (code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
select id, code, name, status, version from sys_dict_type where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_dict_type (id, code, name, status, version) values (#{id}, #{code}, #{name}, #{status}, #{version})
mapper.update: update sys_dict_type set code = #{code}, name = #{name}, status = #{status}, version = version + 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select count(1) from sys_dict_item
and type_id = #{typeId}
select id, type_id, label, value, sort, status, version from sys_dict_item where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_dict_item (id, type_id, label, value, sort, status, version) values (#{id}, #{typeId}, #{label}, #{value}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{version})
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_dict_item where type_id = #{typeId}
